title: viola × eichenfeldii
intro: Viola × eichenfeldii, also known as the hybrid viola, is a plant hybridized from two different species of violas. It is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Viola × eichenfeldii include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Viola × eichenfeldii can be found in teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
